problem id: 34b9db0e
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(5) XOR SHR(4)

examples:
  01000111 -> 11100100
  00110110 -> 11000011
  00000010 -> 01000000
  01001101 -> 10100100
  11101110 -> 11001110
  10111011 -> 01101011
  11101111 -> 11101110
  00000100 -> 10000000

query: 10001010
predicted answer: 01001000
